chapter_title.ar: باب حَالَاتِ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام ) فِي السِّنِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 91 – States of the Imams<sup>asws</sup> regarding the age

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/246)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (4/246)
text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) قَدْ كُنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَهَبَ اللَّهُ لَكَ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) فَكُنْتَ تَقُولُ يَهَبُ اللَّهُ لِي غُلَاماً فَقَدْ وَهَبَ اللَّهُ لَكَ فَقَرَّ عُيُونُنَا فَلَا أَرَانَا اللَّهُ يَوْمَكَ فَإِنْ كَانَ كَوْنٌ فَإِلَى مَنْ

فَأَشَارَ بِيَدِهِ إِلَى أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هُوَ قَائِمٌ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ فَقُلْتُ جُعِلْتُ فِدَاكَ هَذَا ابْنُ ثَلَاثِ سِنِينَ قَالَ وَ مَا يَضُرُّهُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ شَيْ‏ءٌ قَدْ قَامَ عِيسَى ( عليه السلام ) بِالْحُجَّةِ وَ هُوَ ابْنُ ثَلَاثِ سِنِينَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Safwan Bin Yahya who said,

‘I said to Al-Reza<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, ‘We had asked you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> before Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Endowed Abu Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> (9<sup style="font-weight: normal">th</sup> Imam<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>) to you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>. So you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> were saying: ‘Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> will Endow a boy unto me<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>’. So Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> has (now) Endowed him<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> to you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> and our eyes are delighted. May Allah<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> not Show us your<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> day (of passing away). So if it does happen, to whom (should we look to)?’

So he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> gestured by his<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> hand towards Abu Ja’far<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, and he<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> was standing in front of him<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>’. So I said, ‘May I be sacrificed for you<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>! This is a boy of three years old?’ He<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> said: ‘And nothing affects him<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> from that. Isa<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> had stood with the Divine Authority and he<sup style="font-weight: normal">as</sup> was a boy of three years old’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Safwan ibn Yahya who has said the following. “Once I said to abu Ja‘far (a.s.), ‘Before Allah would grant you the blessed birth of abu Ja‘far we would ask you the question and you would say that Allah will soon grant you a son. Allah, now, has blessed you with such a favor and may He make him to be the delight for your heart. We wish not to experience a single day without you but, Allah forbid, if something would happen to you from who must we seek guidance?” He pointed with his hand to abu Ja‘far (a.s.) and he was standing before him. I then said, “May Allah take my soul in service for your cause, he is only a child of three years old.” He said, “That does not matter in his case at all. Jesus rose with Divine authority when he three years old only.”
